languages.text: "Она стала вечным напоминанием о том, что я обрел великое могущество, но так и не смог подготовить достойного преемника".
"She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."
languages.original_text: "Она стала вечным напоминанием о том, что я обрел великое могущество, но так и не смог подготовить достойного преемника".

traits.locale_text: "She became an eternal testament that for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."
"She became an eternal testament that for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."
"She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."
"She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."
"She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."

languages.text: 「私は尽力したものの、私の力では、ふさわしい後継者を育て上げることはできなかった。」
languages.original_text: "She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."

traits.locale_text: 「私は尽力したものの、私の力では、ふさわしい後継者を育て上げることはできなかった。」

languages.text: “她成了永恒的见证：纵使我权倾一世，也未能培养出一个合格的继承人。”
languages.original_text: "She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."

traits.locale_text: “她成了永恒的见证：纵使我权倾一世，也未能培养出一个合格的继承人。”

languages.text: "O, tüm gücüme rağmen değerli bir halef yetiştiremeyişimin ebedî bir kanıtı oldu."
languages.original_text: "She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."

traits.locale_text: "O, tüm gücüme rağmen değerli bir halef yetiştiremeyişimin ebedî bir kanıtı oldu."

languages.text: «Se convirtió en un eterno testamento al hecho de que, pese a mi gran poder, fui incapaz de criar una sucesora digna».
languages.original_text: "She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."

traits.locale_text: «Se convirtió en un eterno testamento al hecho de que, pese a mi gran poder, fui incapaz de criar una sucesora digna».

languages.text: « Elle sera à jamais la preuve que malgré toute ma puissance, je n'ai pas su former une succession digne de ce nom. »
languages.original_text: "She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."

traits.locale_text: « Elle sera à jamais la preuve que malgré toute ma puissance, je n'ai pas su former une succession digne de ce nom. »

languages.text: "Sie wurde ein ewiger Beleg dafür, dass ich trotz meiner Macht nicht in der Lage war, für einen würdigen Nachfolger zu sorgen."
languages.original_text: "She became an eternal testament that, for all my power, I was unable to raise a worthy successor."

traits.locale_text: "Sie wurde ein ewiger Beleg dafür, dass ich trotz meiner Macht nicht in der Lage war, für einen würdigen Nachfolger zu sorgen."
